Automobile Emission Control. Suggestion on Project Topics 1. Collect sample from any polluted water source or effluent from nearby industry like food processing
chemical and biological characteristics and suggest a treatment process with required primary

secondary and tertiary equipment to treat the effluent according to the disposable standards specified by legislation. Use modelling and simulation software to design the process. 2. Collect air sample from flue gas
analyze air quality index and design suitable air quality monitoring/control equipment. 3. Collect any solid waste sample (like e-waste
analyze the characteristics and suggest/design treatment process/equipment. OR Divide the project into 3 parts as follows Project I (15 marks
Do any one project from the given list 1. Identify socially relevant / environmental issue in your nearby locality
explore it and suggest remedial measures. 2. Identify a waste water source in nearby locality and study the physical
chemical characteristics. 3. Collect air sample from flue gas
analyze air quality index. 4. Collect any solid waste sample (like e-waste
analyze the characteristics. Project II (10 marks

Do any one project from the given list 1. Design grit chamber and sedimentation tank for a specific wastewater pollution problem. 2. Design an activated sludge reactor for a specified wastewater pollution issue. 3. Design trickling filter and rotating biological contactor separately to address a specific wastewater pollution challenge. 4. Design any one anaerobic reactor for waste water treatment. 5. Design of an anaerobic digester for a given solid waste management issue. 6. Design any two air pollution controlling equipment. Project III (5 marks
